message:
🌱 helm: Post-renderer not receiving chart hook manifests? (#905)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-7891-post-renderer-not-receiving-chart-hook-manifests",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: Post-renderer not receiving chart hook manifests?",
+    "description": "Post-renderer not receiving chart hook manifests?. Requested by 71+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current helm deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your helm version and configuration:\n```bash\nhelm list --all-namespaces 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working helm installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant helm configuration:\n```bash\nhelm version\n```\nOutput of `helm version`: \n\n```\nversion.BuildInfo{Version:\"v3.1.2\", GitCommit:\"d878d4d45863e42fd5cff6743294a11d28a9abce\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\"}\n```\n\nOutput of `kubectl version`:\n\n```\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\","
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Post-renderer not receiving chart hook manifests?",
+        "description": "Todo:\n```yaml\nversion.BuildInfo{Version:\"v3.1.2\", GitCommit:\"d878d4d45863e42fd5cff6743294a11d28a9abce\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\"}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nhelm version\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Post-renderer not receiving chart hook manifests?\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/7948",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "version.BuildInfo{Version:\"v3.1.2\", GitCommit:\"d878d4d45863e42fd5cff6743294a11d28a9abce\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\"}",
+        "Client Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"17\", GitVersion:\"v1.17.4+k3s1\", GitCommit:\"3eee8ac3a1cf0a216c8a660571329d4bda3bdf77\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-03-25T16:13:25Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"17\", GitVersion:\"v1.17.4+k3s1\", GitCommit:\"3eee8ac3a1cf0a216c8a660571329d4bda3bdf77\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-03-25T16:13:25Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}",
+        "apiVersion: batch/v1\nkind: Job\nmetadata:\n  name: \"{{ .Release.Name }}\"\n  labels:\n    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service | quote }}\n    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name | quote }}\n    app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}\n    helm.sh/chart: \"{{ .Chart.Name }}-{{ .Chart.Version }}\"\n  annotations:\n    # This is what defines this resource as a hook. Without this line, the\n    # job is considered part of the release.\n    \"helm.sh/hook\": pre-install,pre-upgrade\n    \"helm.sh/hook-weight\": \"-5\"\n    \"helm.sh/hook-delete-policy\": before-hook-creation\nspec:\n  backoffLimit: 3 # retry this task 3 times\n  template:\n    metadata:\n      name: \"{{ .Release.Name }}\"\n      labels:\n        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service | quote }}\n        app."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
